name: Crab Meat Bacon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Crab meat drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the tomato juice and beaten egg together.
2. Add the crab meat, bread crumbs, chopped parsley, lemon juice, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper to the mixture. Stir until everything is well combined.
3. Roll the mixture into 18 pieces, each about 2 inches long.
4. Wrap each roll tightly with half a slice of bacon.
5. Secure each roll with a toothpick.
6. Place the rolls on a baking sheet and broil them at a distance of 10 inches from the heat source for about 10 minutes, turning them frequently to ensure even browning.
